toolbar.label: Models
toolbar.subtitle: Download and manage Whisper model weights. Installed models appear in the Settings → Model dropdown.

hfCache.noneFound: No importable models found in the system HuggingFace cache.
hfCache.importMessage: Found {{count}} importable model(s) in the system cache: {{names}}. Importing hard-links or copies the weights into the app-managed models directory — usually finishes in seconds.

venvRequired.title: Python virtualenv not yet created
venvRequired.description: python/.venv/ must be created first and dependencies installed (faster-whisper, torch, a few hundred MB) before models can be listed or downloaded.

toast.downloadStarted: Downloading {{name}} (may take a few minutes depending on network)

confirmDelete.title: Delete model
confirmDelete.message: Delete model "{{name}}"? The downloaded weights will be removed from disk. Next use will require a re-download or a system HuggingFace cache import.

tiny.description: Fastest, lowest accuracy. Good for quick previews.

base.description: Small & fast. Usable for simple English speech.

small.description: Balanced. Handles most clean speech well.

medium.description: Good accuracy for a wide range of languages.

large-v3.description: Newest large model. Best general accuracy.
